info.prompt:
anime art of a dreamlike moment of a 14-year-old Indian girl with light golden skin and dark caramel hair, standing in a remote mountainous landscape. She wears a billowing long pink dress with scattered white floral patterns, cinched at the waist with a silk belt that accentuates her youthful frame. Her dusty sandals rest on a rocky patch of dirt dotted with sparse grasses, as she casually lifts one hand to adjust her loose curls. The backdrop features rolling hills under a sky painted in hazy afternoon gold, with distant village smoke adding rustic charm. The mood is whimsical, captured in cinematic warmth with a slight breeze lifting her hem. watercolor textures enhance the organic aesthetic., world-class masterpiece, 4k, best quality, anime art.

Overall, it's an absolute world-class masterpiece anime-inspired artwork. It's an aesthetically pleasing anime art with impeccable attention to detail and beautiful composition.
